elections.name: GE14 — 14th General Election
elections.headline_fact: PH won 4/6 parliament + 15/28 DUN. BN won 2 parliament + 13 DUN. PH formed state government.

dun_results.winner_candidate: Mohd Sofi bin Abdul Wahab (Sofi Wahab)

elections.name: PRN15 — 15th State Election
elections.headline_fact: BN LANDSLIDE: 21/28 DUN seats. PH won 5, PN won 2. BN regained state government.

dun_results.runner_up_candidate: Mohd Sofi bin Abdul Wahab (Sofi Wahab)

dun_results.winner_candidate: Mohd Noor Helmy bin Abdul Halem

elections.name: GE15 — 15th General Election
elections.headline_fact: PN won 3 (P134, P136, P139), PH won 3 (P135, P137, P138), BN won 0. Melaka parliament split evenly PN 3 / PH 3.

current_dun_composition.winner_candidate: Mohd Noor Helmy bin Abdul Halem

elections.dun_context_note: GE15 (19 Nov 2022) elected parliament seats only. DUN seats were last contested in PRN15 (20 Nov 2021). Current DUN composition shown below is from PRN15.
